downstream_boundaries.statement: The handoff does not decide authority applicability or non-applicability.
The handoff does not generate or validate an applicability rule pack.
The handoff does not run compliance review or create compliance findings.
The handoff does not make legal advice, legal sufficiency conclusions, or final agency decisions.
Expected future EA package artifacts are checklist slots; they are not required to exist when the handoff is generated.
